title: 2026 04 07 HackerNews
content: Google released an offline iPhone app that runs Gemma 4 LLMs locally for privacy and edge‑AI. A tiny 8‑million‑parameter model, GuppyLM, demonstrates core LLM mechanics in a browser. Commentary criticizes forced app downloads, Microsoft’s disjointed GUI strategy, and broad UI rule violations. Swiss fiber surpasses U.S. and German broadband due to shared infrastructure. Claude Code’s February updates reduced reasoning depth, causing performance drops. France moved remaining gold out of the U.S., earning €13 bn gains. Employers now use personal data to set pay floors. Local LLM hosting tools (LM Studio, LM Studio CLI) and MoE models enable efficient on‑device inference.
eventKey: 2026-hackernews
normalizedTitle: 2026 04 07 hackernews

title: 8点1氪丨胖东来再回应“鸡蛋被检出角黄素”；苹果首款折叠屏手机已在试产；2026清明档电影票房已破2.8亿元
content: The article covers various news items: a claim that a Chinese supermarket chain, Pang Donglai, found no safety violations after testing eggs; Apple's fold‑screen iPhone is in trial production with a 2026 launch target; 2026 Qingming holiday movie box office surpassed ¥280 million and traffic volume rose 6 % to 845 million itineraries. Other highlights include a prank of Ibuprofen around Cao Cao’s tomb, a U.S. presidential health rumor debunked by the White House, a fraud case involving basketball player Guo Ailun, a Saudi oil price hike, and several tech company updates such as Intel’s AI chip talks, Nvidia’s investment, and Samsung’s record profits.

title: 停止和大模型聊天：产品经理的AI工作流重构指南
content: The article explains why most product managers still use AI as a simple chat tool, limiting productivity. It introduces “Agentic Workflow,” which turns AI into an autonomous, self‑correcting executor, seamlessly accesses project context, and builds reusable assets. Three key shifts are: moving from manual feedback loops to closed‑loop execution, from limited prompts to continuous context sharing, and from consumptive usage to investment‑style asset accumulation. It provides a concrete case of post‑launch failure analysis, showing how structured local files and AI tools like Cursor enable end‑to‑end insight generation, turning PMs into strategic architects rather than just executioners.
eventKey: 停止和大模型聊天-产品经理的ai工作流重构指南
normalizedTitle: 停止和大模型聊天 产品经理的ai工作流重构指南

title: 美军特种兵潜入伊朗救人场面失控，运输机「失灵」了，为什么会出现这种情况？暴露出美军的哪些短板？
content: A U.S. special‑forces raid in Iran went awry when two MC‑130 transport planes failed to lift off, forcing the use of smaller aircraft to evacuate a wounded F‑15E weapons officer who had hid on a mountain ridge. U.S. troops interfered with Iranian electronics, bombed surrounding roads, and destroyed the abandoned transport aircraft to prevent capture. Iranian officials claim two black‑hawk helicopters and two C‑130s were shot down, while the U.S. maintains only mechanical failure. This incident highlights logistical and operational vulnerabilities in U.S. air operations.
eventKey: 美军特种兵潜入伊朗救人场面失控-运输机「失灵」了-为什么会出现这种情况-暴露出美军的哪些短板

title: 真正的一手战地情报：霍尔木兹海峡实地调研 | 原文
content: The article reports on a firsthand investigation of the Strait of Hormuz, a key energy corridor with limited real‑time visibility. An analyst (designer “No. 3”) was sent by the Sitorisidi Research Firm to assess whether the strait remains open or closed. During the trip, the analyst faced restrictions at the Oman border, covertly transported equipment, and encountered stringent protocols in Musandam. The mission revealed significant gaps in public data and underscored the challenges of monitoring such a strategically critical location.

title: 老挝：一场“被遗忘的战争”与绵延不散的伤痕 | 原文
content: Much of Laos remains scarred by a war that is often called “forgotten.”  In Vientiane’s COPE visitor centre, displays show that bombing stopped, yet buried mines, amputations and the psychological trauma they cause persist.  Photographs depict a severed leg with bone exposed, a young man laughing after a leg amputation, and other survivors.  The centre is a reminder that war‑injuries still haunt the country’s population and landscape.
eventKey: 一场“被遗忘的战争”与绵延不散的伤痕
normalizedTitle: 老挝 一场“被遗忘的战争”与绵延不散的伤痕 原文

title: 交易成功的核心要素：顺势、止损、规则、执行力
content: The core of successful trading is following the market trend, setting well‑defined stop‑losses, operating under strict rules, and executing them with discipline. Traders must determine a suitable trend‑analysis period, use simple, clear reversal criteria, and trade only when conditions are met—avoiding sideways markets. Stop‑losses convert probability advantage into certainty, preventing big losses that can wipe out many small wins. Rules limit emotional, impulsive trading, and disciplined execution ensures the plan actually works.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 鑫鑫-投资
eventKey: 交易成功的核心要素-执行力
normalizedTitle: 交易成功的核心要素 顺势 止损 规则 执行力
representativeSources: 热帖 - 雪球 - 鑫鑫-投资

title: GitHub Copilot CLI combines model families for a second opinion
content: GitHub Copilot CLI now offers “Rubber Duck,” a second‑model reviewer that checks plans, code, and tests before execution. Pairing Claude Sonnet with GPT‑5.4 closes 74.7 % of the performance gap between Sonnet and Opus on difficult, multi‑file tasks. Rubber Duck reviews key checkpoints—after planning, complex implementation, or before test run—and can be called on demand. It finds architectural flaws, logical bugs, and hidden edge cases, improving accuracy for high‑stakes code generation.

title: 特大城市可借助“中国模式”摆脱石油冲击
content: Megacities can use a “China‑style” approach to mitigate oil shocks. By centralizing planning, expanding public transit, cutting vehicle use, and boosting local food production, large urban areas can reduce reliance on imported fuel and limit the economic impact of oil price spikes. The strategy emphasizes coordinated investment, infrastructure upgrades, and policy alignment across local governments.

title: 🖼 很可惜，几乎没人关注美国重返月球之旅
content: NASA’s Artemis II is now gliding past the Moon’s far side, exceeding the Apollo 17 outbound distance and marking humanity’s farthest travel from Earth in half a century. Four astronauts—including a Canadian and a woman—will observe the Moon from its unseen side for the first time. A live broadcast on the mission’s website and social media will show the spacecraft’s approach, with the closest point to the far side scheduled for 19–21 p.m. EDT on the 6th (7 a.m.–9 a.m. Beijing time).
eventKey: 很可惜-几乎没人关注美国重返月球之旅

content: Bloomberg reports on the growing deployment of AI-driven “truth machines” in conflict settings. These systems analyze data streams, generate rapid intelligence, and influence decision‑making for military and security forces. The article examines their technical capabilities, ethical implications, and potential to shape battlefield outcomes while raising concerns over accuracy, accountability, and transparency. It highlights how truth‑seeking algorithms are increasingly used to support strategic operations worldwide.

title: VCF 生成器 Lite v5.0.0 已经发布，批量导入手机通讯录
content:
VCF 生成器 Lite v5.0.0 已经发布，批量导入手机通讯录 此版本更新内容包括：

新特性
版本号构建号扩展：Windows 端版本号的构建号现支持预发布、后发布及开发代码标识。
停止生成文件：新增支持停止生成文件的功能。
环境信息展示：关于窗口中添加了环境信息。
修复
zipapp shebang：修复 zipapp 打包后缺失 shebang 行的问题。
Linux 多屏居中：Linux 端不再强制居中于屏幕，解决了多屏幕环境下的居中错位问题。
错误号码滚动：修复定位错误号码时不会自动滚动的问题。
链接引用：修复链接引用错误。…
source: 开源中国-全部 - Gitee快讯

title: 不小心用美区 ID 付了国区 ID 的 Apple Developer Program，后续怎么处理
content: You accidentally paid your Apple Developer Program subscription using a US Apple ID for a Chinese Apple ID, and Apple flagged a mismatch between payment and enrollment details. They now require you to upload a government‑issued photo ID that matches your enrollment data. You can ignore the email and hope the order cancels, upload a passport to verify, or proactively contact Apple Developer Support to cancel the order. The recommended action is to provide the needed ID or seek support to resolve the discrepancy.

title: 李录坚守比亚迪 23 年：什么样的企业能真正成功？
content: Li Lu, who has held a BYD stock for 23 years, attributes his success to nine core principles: first‐principle strategic thinking and engineer execution; unwavering resilience and fearlessness; a trustee mindset aligning founder and investor interests; boundaryless cross‑industry manufacturing; compounding learning and iterative improvement; capitalizing on the electric‑vehicle revolution; leveraging China’s unified market for global reach; a long‑term investment focus on intrinsic value growth; and continuous, high‑intensity R&D investment. These factors, he notes, distinguish truly successful companies.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 炼金女王

title: 115 网盘如何多端稳定挂载？
content: 115网盘的挂载功能在多端使用时会因为防盗机制导致另一端被踢下线。为解决此问题，作者开发了基于 Cloudflare Serverless 的工具（https://115.115115.sbs/），它提供不同应用 ID 的 token，避免了 token 冲突。相较于 Openlist 的固定 ID 工具，该方法更安全且多端兼容。获取的 refreshtoken 有效期为一年，建议及时刷新并合理使用。

title: Peter Yang on Small Teams, Coding Agents, and Why Human Ambition Has No Ceiling
content: Peter Yang of Roblox explains how AI agents are replacing everyday apps, making coding tools feel like slot machines, and lowering software development costs almost to zero. He argues future companies will stay intentionally small, the IDE will become a thinking tool rather than a construction tool, and that human ambition will continually create more jobs than AI eliminates. He discusses the implications of near-zero building costs for innovation and employment.

title: 北大人气地震课｜万字完整版炒股挣钱实战策略！
content: The text summarizes a Peking University professor’s lecture on stock‑market basics and practical strategies. It explains market ecology, the disadvantages of retail investors, and common mistakes. Three‑dimensional analysis (macro, industry, company) is recommended before trading, alongside disciplined order entry, exit signals, and risk control. It stresses trend following, position sizing, stop‑losses, and avoiding high‑risk stocks. The guide concludes that success depends on discipline, patience, and informed, flexible decision‑making rather than chasing quick gains.

title: GitHub 中有些人给代码放恶意代码，如何针对他？
content: Researchers discovered that some GitHub repositories, such as one owned by Douyin‑Live, hide malicious code in the live preview versus the actual file. When the repository was compiled, errors revealed that the `liveMan.py` file contains hidden code at line 9 that executes malicious actions. This gap between preview and code allows attackers to embed harmful scripts. The mystery explains why the repository caused errors and reveals the presence of hidden, potentially malicious code.
eventKey: github-中有些人给代码放恶意代码-如何针对他
normalizedTitle: github 中有些人给代码放恶意代码 如何针对他

title: Connecting MCP servers to Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Gateway using Authorization Code flow
content: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Gateway centralizes authentication, observability, and policy enforcement for AI agents connecting to multiple MCP servers. It supports OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code flow via Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Identity, allowing agents to access protected servers without embedding credentials. Admin users can set up MCP targets either by completing the OAuth flow during target creation (implicit sync) or by providing tool schemas upfront. Users listing tools use cached definitions, while invoking tools triggers the OAuth flow, which is secured with session‑binding to prevent hijacking.
eventKey: connecting-mcp-servers-amazon-bedrock-agentcore
normalizedTitle: connecting mcp servers to amazon bedrock agentcore gateway using authorization code flow

title: Google One Pro 最近大幅度提升了存储空间，这个能不能代替 iCloud？
content: Google One Pro has recently increased its storage offering, prompting a user with an iPhone and a backup Redmi device to question whether it could replace iCloud. The user finds the 2 TB iCloud plan expensive and considers switching to Google One, especially since they already use ChatGPT. They ask for opinions on the feasibility of fully adopting Google One and its overall experience.

title: Google Maps for Codebases: Paste a GitHub URL, Ask Anything
content: Codebase Navigator lets users paste a GitHub URL and ask plain‑English questions about the repo. It builds a real dependency graph from imports, highlights relevant lines, shows the file tree, and updates a code viewer—all in real time. Built with Next.js, CopilotKit, Octokit, React Flow, and Ollama (or OpenAI) for LLM queries, it uses local caching, Zustand for state, and tool‑based LLM interactions to avoid hallucinations and keep everything in sync.

title: Age Verification as Mass Surveillance Infrastructure
content: Age verification systems used online, while intended to enforce legal and safety standards, can also serve as a framework for mass surveillance. By collecting demographic data and monitoring user activity to confirm age, these tools aggregate large amounts of personal information that can be accessed or analyzed by government or corporate entities. The article examines how such verification infrastructures expand surveillance capabilities beyond their original purpose.

title: 一日一撸码（No.3）： claude code provider 快速切换启动器（for CC switch users）
content: CCSC is a tool for Claude Switch users who need to use multiple Claude service providers (Anthropic, local models, Coding plans). It avoids the default method of editing ~/.claude/settings.json, which changes global settings and affects currently running sessions. Instead, CCSC isolates each session by launching new Claude processes, leaving global config untouched, and lets each terminal use a different provider. It integrates with existing CC Switch configurations, making it useful for developing projects with different providers or testing a code base across models.

title: 30 秒自测--快速鉴定 Claude 模型真伪
content: A quick self‑check for Claude Opus 4.6 uses three tests: ask the model its exact name (Opus 4.6 will specify “Claude Opus 4.6”); copy a sentence with Chinese quotes and verify that the output uses straight quotation marks—real Opus changes Chinese quotes, fakes keep the original curves; and submit a Japanese‑name prompt that forces multiple languages; real Opus shows garbled text (Mojibake) and a “stress‑test” pattern, while fakes produce clean output. Combine results for a reliable assessment.
eventKey: 秒自测--快速鉴定-claude-模型真伪
normalizedTitle: 30 秒自测--快速鉴定 claude 模型真伪

title: Java 项目如何使用 claude code
content: You maintain a large Java project with 15,000 classes and use JRebel for hot deployment. Your leaders provide verbal requirements, and you are exploring how to integrate Claude Code (cc). Currently, you are not using a `claude.md` file; instead, you manually report Idea errors to cc, who modifies the code. After cc’s changes, you compile via Maven configured in Idea, but you encounter path, whitespace, and other errors, leading to a poor experience. The question is how to properly use cc for Java development—whether cc should modify code, use Idea’s hot deployment, or handle errors differently.
